decisions.briefing: Risk-on session with NASDAQ surging +1.6% and S&P 500 up +0.8%, a favorable backdrop for our tech-heavy portfolio. However, cash sits at just $269.62 — well below the $500 threshold — so no new positions can be sized meaningfully even with 4 open slots available. Existing holdings look healthy: AAOI remains in the bullish momentum zone (RSI 64, score 90), and AMZN continues grinding higher above our cost basis, though its RSI of 77.9 warrants watching for a fade.

market_education.summary_en: Equities rallied broadly on Thursday as technology and growth stocks led the charge, with the NASDAQ outperforming the broader S&P 500 by nearly 2-to-1. The risk-on tone was driven by easing trade-war concerns and better-than-expected earnings guidance from several large-cap tech names, which boosted investor confidence in forward growth. Semiconductor and AI-related names were among the biggest beneficiaries, consistent with a market rotating back into high-beta growth.
market_education.summary_zh: 週四美股全面走高，科技及成長股領漲，那斯達克指數表現遠優於標普500。市場風險偏好回升，主因貿易緊張局勢緩和，加上多家大型科技企業發布優於預期的盈利展望，提振投資者對未來增長的信心。半導體及人工智能相關概念股成為最大受益者，市場資金明顯重新流入高貝塔成長股。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Cash drag is the performance penalty a portfolio suffers when uninvested cash sits idle while the market rises. Today's risk-on rally is a textbook example: our $269.62 in cash earned nothing while NASDAQ climbed 1.6%. Keeping cash below the minimum buyable threshold ($500) means we miss out on capturing momentum — which is why the system enforces a 'deploy idle cash' rule when slots are open.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「現金拖累」是指投資組合中閒置現金未能投入市場，在股市上漲時所承受的機會成本損失。今日風險偏好回升正是典型案例：我們持有的$269.62現金毫無收益，而那斯達克卻上漲了1.6%。當現金低於最低可購金額門檻（$500）時，便錯失了追蹤市場動能的機會，這也正是系統設立「有空位且有閒置現金則積極部署」規則的原因。
